title: A Brave Rescue in Iran
summary: A US airman was rescued in a dangerous mission in Iran after his fighter jet was shot down. The jet had two people on board, and the pilot was saved quickly, but the airman was missing. Iran wanted to capture him and offered money for his capture. The airman hid in a mountain crack and used a beacon to help rescuers find him. Many special forces, warplanes, helicopters, and the CIA worked together to save him. President Trump announced the rescue on social media. This was the first time in over 20 years that a US fighter jet was shot down by enemy fire. The airman only had a handgun to protect himself while waiting for help.

background_read: This article is about a rescue mission in Iran, a country far away. Sometimes, military planes get into trouble during conflicts. When that happens, special teams work hard to save the people on board. In this story, the airman used training to stay safe and help rescuers find him. It shows how countries can work together in dangerous situations, even when they disagree.
Article_Structure: WHO: US airman, pilot, special forces, CIA, President Trump
WHAT: Rescue of a missing airman after his fighter jet was shot down in Iran
WHY: To save the airman from capture by Iran and bring him home safely

perspectives.description: The mission shows bravery and teamwork in saving a life.
